title: Healthcare Readmission Risk Prediction
summary: Build a risk model for 30-day hospital readmission using structured EHR features and interpretable ML.

title: Diabetic Retinopathy Image Classification
summary: Train a computer vision model to classify diabetic retinopathy severity from retinal fundus images.

title: Clinical Text Summarization for Discharge Notes
summary: Develop an NLP pipeline to summarize long clinical discharge notes into concise summaries.

title: Heart Disease Risk Scoring Dashboard
summary: Create a web dashboard that predicts heart disease risk and visualizes key factors for clinicians.

title: Cancer Survival Analysis
summary: Estimate survival probability and risk groups for cancer cohorts using classical ML and feature analysis.

title: Air Quality Forecasting with IoT Sensors
summary: Forecast PM2.5 levels from sensor streams and weather variables for urban air monitoring.

title: Phishing URL Detection Service
summary: Build a cybersecurity classifier that identifies phishing URLs using lexical and host-based features.

title: Cloud Spend Anomaly Detection
summary: Detect unusual cloud cost spikes and generate alerts with probable root-cause tags.

title: Academic Credential Verification on Blockchain
summary: Issue and verify tamper-resistant academic credentials through smart contracts and web interface.

title: Mental Health Signal Mining from Social Media
summary: Extract depression and anxiety indicators from text posts with explainable NLP features.

title: Nutrition Recommendation Mobile App
summary: Recommend meal plans based on health metrics and dietary goals in a mobile client.

title: Student Dropout Early Warning System
summary: Predict dropout risk using attendance, grades, and engagement data for intervention planning.
